description: Add a TEST tab to the CRUCIBLE header navigation bar
instructions: Add a new 'Test' tab to the navigation bar in ui/src/components/NavBar.tsx. The tab should appear after the 'Graphs' tab. It should link to '/test'. Also create a minimal placeholder page at ui/src/pages/Test.tsx that shows a heading 'Test' and a brief placeholder message. Register the route in ui/src/main.tsx. Run the frontend build with: cd ui && npx tsc -b && npx vite build to verify no errors.
